<!-- <h1 class=unnumbered id="front-matter">Front Matter</h1> -->

# Front Matter {#fm-placeholder .unnumbered}

<br>

![](images/Cover.png)

<br>

::: {.text-center style="font-size: 0.8rem;"}

First Draft Edition: March 2026

© 2026 Matthew A. Turner

All rights reserved.

<br>

Published by **Agile Publishers** in Merced, California. 

Agile Publishers is an imprint of _SubtleTea Solutions, LLC_.

:::
